title: agnostos #0057
definition:
1) unknown, forgotten
 ++++
 Epimenides, a certain Cretan, came to Athens to stop a plague. He
 offered a sheep on altars the born no name of no god but to the
 "unknown god". At least one of the altars survived to Paul's day.
